request.name: Accept, decline, start, or complete a booking (technician only)

description.content:
Valid `action` values and required current status:
- `ACCEPT` (REQUESTED -> ACCEPTED)
- `DECLINE` (REQUESTED -> DECLINED)
- `START` (PAID -> IN_PROGRESS)
- `COMPLETE` (IN_PROGRESS -> COMPLETED)

item.name: Manually re-verify and finalize a pending payment

request.name: Manually re-verify and finalize a pending payment

description.content:
Provider-agnostic: re-checks the payment with whichever gateway it used
(Stripe session retrieval, or SSLCommerz order validation using the
val_id captured by the success/IPN callback) and marks it COMPLETED +
the booking PAID if the gateway confirms success. Useful for
confirming a payment from Postman without a public webhook URL.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Conflicts with existing state (duplicate, already paid, etc.)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Backend API for **FixItNow**, a home services marketplace connecting customers
with technicians (plumbing, electrical, cleaning, painting, etc).

All responses share one envelope shape:
- Success: `{ "success": true, "message": string, "data": ..., "meta"?: {...} }`
- Error:   `{ "success": false, "message": string, "errorDetails": ... }`

Authenticate by logging in (or registering) to receive a JWT, then send it as
`Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected endpoints.
